periods.name: Thursday
periods.short_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 96. Heat index values as high as 102. Southwest wind 15 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
